steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code while viewing the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit workspace.
Type 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the Visual Studio Code command palette input box at the top center of the interface.
Click the "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" option in the command palette at the top of the Visual Studio Code window.
Type "Preview in Copilot (Chrome)" into the VS Code "Run and Debug" configuration dropdown input at the top of the main window.
Press Enter to select "Preview in Copilot (Chrome)" from the run configuration dropdown in the Visual Studio Code toolbar.
Click on the "Password" input field within the Microsoft login page to focus the cursor for entering text.
Type  ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}} into the Password field on the Microsoft login page for user ${{M365.AZURE_ACCOUNT_NAME}}.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the password and proceed on the Microsoft login page.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm "Stay signed in?" by selecting "Yes" on the Microsoft login prompt.
Zoom out the viewport in the browser displaying the "Chat | M365 Copilot" page by using the keyboard shortcut: Ctrl + -.
